assert.comment: Lenient ratchet-FLOOR budgets (#671): these pass today and only fail if a page regresses below the floor. Raise them as the pages improve — treat every bump as a one-way ratchet, never a loosening. Perf/LCP are WARN (CI timing is noisy on a cold container); SEO, a11y and CLS are ERROR because they are stable and directly track the open tickets (#513/#514 SEO, #66/#266 a11y).
